steps.title: Understand what 'emphasize a difference' requires
steps.content: To emphasize is to make something stand out — this requires explicit contrast language, not just information about both items.

steps.title: Evaluate the choices
steps.content: Choice D's “whereas” and statement that eggs “were longer” make the size difference unmistakable. A, B, and C mention both species without highlighting the difference. That matches choice D — D is correct.
